text:
On Fri, Aug 31, 2001 at 02:22:55PM -0700, Paul English wrote:
> >Originator:     Paul English
> >Release:        FreeBSD 4.1.1-RELEASE i386

There have been several bug fdixes in the ahc code since 4.1.1 -
is it possible for you to try a newer kernel? I'll assign the PR
to Justin Gibbs, who may know if any fixes have been made which
are likely to help your situation.

	David.
